summary: Iteration 11: Testing P0 UI modernization and P1 CRUD Edit functionality on Machines, Centres de Charge, and Indisponibilités pages. All backend (17/17) and frontend (10/10) tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test data for e2e verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 UI and P1 CRUD Edit features fully verified and working.

machines_page.rounded_corners: rounded-lg on buttons, form inputs, table cells

centres_de_charge_page.rounded_corners: rounded-lg on buttons, form inputs, table cells

unavailability_page.rounded_corners: rounded-lg on buttons, form inputs, table cells

machines.edit_button: Pencil icon per row with data-testid='edit-machine-{id}'

edit_form.title: Shows 'Modifier: {machine_id}'
edit_form.id_field: Disabled in edit mode, enabled in create mode
edit_form.submit_button: 'Enregistrer' in edit mode, 'Créer' in create mode

centres_de_charge.edit_button: Pencil icon per row with data-testid='edit-btn-{id}'

edit_form.title: Shows 'Modifier: {centre_id}'
edit_form.id_field: Disabled in edit mode, enabled in create mode
edit_form.submit_button: 'Enregistrer' in edit mode, 'Créer' in create mode

unavailability.edit_button: Pencil icon per row with data-testid='edit-unavailability-{id}'

edit_form.title: Shows 'Modifier l'indisponibilité'
edit_form.submit_button: 'Enregistrer' in edit mode, 'Créer' in create mode

machine_crud_cycle.edit: Modified name to 'E2E Test Machine EDITED'
machine_crud_cycle.verify: Change persisted and visible in table

test_methodology: Backend: pytest with 17 test cases covering all CRUD operations. Frontend: Playwright browser automation for UI verification and e2e CRUD cycle testing.
